title: Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Pan, 26cm (10inch) Frying Pan with Lid, Compatible with All Cooktops Up to 315℃, Fast & Even Heat, Skillet, Induction Cookware, Cooking Pan
features: 【Compatible with All Cooktops Up to 315℃, Glass Lid 149℃】
【Usage Suggestions 】Nontoxicook Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Pan Efficient Allows Heat to Pass Through the Entire Pan Fast. Please Do Not Heat the Empty Cooker. Suggest Cooking with Medium-Low Heat

【EFFICIENT EVEN HEAT】Nontoxicook Frying Pan Combines 304 Food Grade Stainless Steel, an Aluminium Core, and 18/0 Outer Stainless Steel. Nontoxicook Skillets and Frying Pans Allows Heat to Pass Through the Entire Pan, Bottom to Sidewall, with Quick & Even Heat

【ENERGY SAVING】Nontoxicook Frying Pan with Lid Can Save Fuel By Up To 20%. Efficient Heating, Energy Savings Make It a Great Choice for Cooks Seeking Both Performance and Savings. 3-Layer Metal Construction Delivers Performance and Durability for Years to Come

【NON TOXIC】Nontoxicook 26cm Pan's 18/10 Stainless Steel Cooking Surface Won't React with Food to Alter Natural Tastes, Delivers Fresh, Flavorful Results. Nontoxicook 26cm Frying Pan also has More Surface Area than the Average 28cm Skillet on the Market, Providing a Wider Cooking Space

【DURABLE & HEAVY DUTY】Nontoxicook 26cm Stainless Steel Frying Pan is Not Only Durable and Heavy-Duty But Also Enables Its Body to Withstand a High Temperature of Up To 315℃. The Sturdy Hollow Handle Design Reduces Heat Transfer. The Clear Tempered Glass Lid Stays On Tight, Making It Easy To Monitor Your Meals at All Times.Featuring a Steam Vent For Safety, And a Sturdy Hollow Handle Design To Reduce Heat Transfer

【PRACTICAL & CLASSIC】Nontoxicook Induction Frying Pan 26cm Features a Rounded and Encapsulated Rim, which Enables Drip-Free Pouring and Easy Transfers. Nontoxicook 26cm Skillet Supports Various Cooking Methods Ranging From Stove to Oven. Moreover, It has a Rivet-Free Surface to Eliminate Food Traps and is Easy to Clean and Dishwasher Safe

【WIDELY APPLICABLE 】Nontoxicook Stainless Steel Pan is Suitable for Cooking Methods Such as Frying, Stir-Frying, Steaming, Baking and Searing. Nontoxicook Triply Cooking Pans Well-Suited for Both Family Kitchens and Commercial Kitchens

specifications_table.Material: ‎3-Ply Construction: 18/10 Food-Grade Stainless Steel Interior, Aluminium Core, 18/0 Food-Grade Stainless Steel Exterior
specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Dishwasher Safe, Oven Safe, Electric Stovetop Compatible, Ergonomic Handle, Detachable Handle, Gas Stovetop Compatible, Heavy Duty, Includes Lid, Induction Stovetop Compatible
